items.name: Crimson Flame Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🔥 Bold • Stylish • Adventurous
This vibrant red coat isn’t just clothing — it’s a statement. The rich crimson color immediately catches the eye, while the belted waist and flowing cut give it a sleek silhouette full of confidence. Subtle flame-like patterns near the hem add a sense of energy and motion, as if the coat carries its own spark.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
❤️ Crimson red fabric that stands out in any crowd
🔥 Subtle flame accents for a touch of dynamic flair
🧵 Detailed belts and seams for depth and realism
✨ PBR textures that make the coat come alive
🎮 Ideal for fantasy, stylish streetwear, or heroic avatars
🔍 Keywords: red coat, crimson fashion, long jacket, stylish outfit, flame design, Roblox PBR clothing, bold fashion, fantasy wear, heroic style
This coat is for players who want to look confident, adventurous, and unforgettable — a piece that burns bright without being too loud.
High-quality PBR textures included.

High above the Roblox skies, where the stars twinkle like diamonds, lives Lunella, the Bat Cinderella. Once an ordinary bat, she was enchanted by a moonbeam on a magical night, giving her shimmering wings and a heart full of dreams. Now, she soars through the night, spreading stardust and guiding lost travelers back home.

items.name: Montefortino Helmet Type II [PBR]
items.description:
The Montefortino Helmet is the definitive helmet for the Italic region from the 4th century B.C. up to the 1st century A.D. This is the helmet you will see on a roman soldier during the republican period. 

Type 2 Montefortino helmets are dated from 4th - 3rd Century B.C. and are characterised as being taller and with a more bulbous spherical helmet shape, especially compared to the earlier type 1 helmets.

This specific accessory was modeled after the Montefortino find in Apulia (Puglia), Italy and now held in the British Museum. Classifications by John M. Paddock.

Modeled by: OldWizard121

Textured by: OldWizard121

items.name: Royal Forest Green Short Robe / Coat
items.description:
Also see the full-length Royal Forest Green Robe With Gold Belt Buckle:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/18995042335

This is a great robe that fits many different themes. This can be used as the attire for a wealthy medieval person, such as royalty or the elite merchants, or it can be used in the fantasy realm for elven rangers, hunters, etc.

Of course this robe is a great fit for Christmas.
